untranslatable_reason: Ehlers' Fisher Transform is not available in the allowed indicators list. The signal specifically requires this custom oscillator which operates on a normalized scale (-1 to +1 or -100 to +100). Substituted with stoch_k as a functionally similar overbought/oversold oscillator, but this is an approximation. The exact Fisher Transform calculation and its specific threshold behavior cannot be replicated with allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Signal requires Ehlers' Fisher Transform (peaks above 80 = entry, returns to near zero = exit). This indicator is not in the allowed list. Substituted stoch_k as functionally similar mean-reversion oscillator with overbought threshold at 80 and exit when crossing below 20 (approximate return to neutral). Original signal implies SHORT entry (sell platinum/buy gold = short platinum relative position) but direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT due to cross-asset nature (platinum vs gold pair trade). Manual review recommended to confirm correct asset pair implementation.
